title: ageratina aromatica var. incisa
intro: Ageratina aromatica var. incisa, also known as Mexican tea or false pennyroyal, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant, which can help to relieve symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ageratina aromatica var. incisa include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
